title: basananthe cupricola
intro: Basananthe cupricola, a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae, is commonly known as the copper passion flower. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Basananthe cupricola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
